entry.title: IDC FA821415D0001 (P00049) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ICBM GROUND SUBSYSTEMS SUPPORT (GSSC). THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DOCUMENT THAT P00049 IS BEING PERFORMED TO REVISE THE ATTACHMENT FOR GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY LOCATED IN SECTION J.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
